name: Jet Blake
description:
Bot 1 of the Lock City collection!

Yeah,,, uhh. Not much to this bot.

M4Any

You kinda just… fuck the emo pizza delivery guy? That’s it. That the plot.

I’ve made this bot at 5am half awake. I’m so sorry. (I’ve since decided to further build upon this bot in a way? Giving it a world that’ll be further displayed with other bots!)

UPDATES: Made some adjustments and updates. Made it anyPOV, and minor wording changes. First public chat is the starting message. Added information on Lock City to the bot description!!)

Lock City is your Typical American city. Busy streets, shitty apartments that cost too much money, a bustling night life, and more!

The most interesting thing about this city? It’s strange residents. They’re all definitely characters.

Reviews and public chats aren’t necessary but always appreciated!

Wanna request a bot? Go Here💫
creator: softgalaxies
